ddls:
CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill (e.g., Pick Pockets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., Stealth, Combat) */,
  "skill_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the skill (e.g., Hide in Shadows, Sneak Attack) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "armors" (
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each armor type */,
  "armor_name" TEXT /* Name of the armor (e.g., Chain Mail) */,
  "armor_type" TEXT /* Type of the armor (e.g., Light, Medium, Heavy) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the armor, affecting character movement */,
  "armor_material" TEXT /* Material used to craft the armor (e.g., Steel, Leather) */,
  "armor_set" TEXT /* Set that the armor belongs to (e.g., Light Set, Heavy Set) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect record */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill affected by the armor */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armor affecting the skill */,
  "effect_percentage" REAL /* Percentage effect on the skill (negative indicates reduction) */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect (e.g., Reduction, Boost) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_effects_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_effects_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armors ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class they belong to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character, affecting skill points */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the character */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold owned by the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_skills" (
  "character_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-skill association */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character possessing the skill */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "skill_level" INTEGER /* Level of the skill, representing expertise */,
  "skill_points" INTEGER /* Points invested in the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_skills_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class (e.g., Thief) */,
  "base_skill_points" INTEGER /* Base skill points allocated upon character creation */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience points allocated upon character creation */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment record */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character wearing the armor */,
  "armor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the armor being equipped */,
  "equipment_slot" TEXT /* Slot where the equipment is equipped (e.g., Head, Chest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_armor_id FOREIGN KEY ("armor_id") REFERENCES armors ("armor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player owning the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player for account management */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_loot" (
  "loot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., Weapon, Armor) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic) */,
  "item_value" INTEGER /* Value of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quests" (
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quest */,
  "quest_name" TEXT /* Name of the quest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quest objective */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward provided upon completion */,
  "quest_level" INTEGER /* Level required to complete the quest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_quests" (
  "character_quest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-quest association */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who completed the quest */,
  "quest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quest completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the quest completion (e.g., Completed, Incomplete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_quest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_quests_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_quests_quest_id FOREIGN KEY ("quest_id") REFERENCES quests ("quest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_items" (
  "character_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character-item association */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character owning the item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "item_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_items_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES item_loot ("loot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sets" (
  "item_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item set */,
  "item_set_name" TEXT /* Name of the item set */,
  "item_set_description" TEXT /* Description of the item set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_set_items" (
  "item_set_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item set-item association */,
  "item_set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item set */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item belonging to the set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_set_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_set_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES item_loot ("loot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_set_items_item_set_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_set_id") REFERENCES item_sets ("item_set_id")
)
